title: AuthenticationError: JWT signature verification failed - invalid algorithm

metadata.value: JWT signature verification failed: token specifies alg:none but server requires HS256 or RS256

data.text: This is the JWT alg:none bypass — CVE class vulnerability. Opening PR #840.

title: AuthenticationError: Token audience claim validation bypass

metadata.value: Token accepted with aud claim for 'email-service' on API endpoint — audience validation not enforced

title: AuthenticationError: JWT public key not found in cache after rotation

metadata.value: Public key with kid='2026-03-15-v2' not found in in-memory key cache; cache initialized at startup and not refreshed

data.text: Fixed in PR #821 — merged. Key cache now has TTL and rotation event hook.

title: DatabaseTimeoutError: connection pool exhausted acquiring connection after 30s

metadata.value: context deadline exceeded after 30000ms waiting for available connection: pool size=100 in_use=100 idle=0 waiting=47

title: DatabaseTimeoutError: query exceeded 10s timeout in analytics aggregation

metadata.value: pq: canceling statement due to statement timeout: SELECT COUNT(*), DATE_TRUNC('hour', created_at) FROM events WHERE ... GROUP BY 2 -- exceeded 10000ms

title: NullPointerException: payment.Method is null when processing card charge

metadata.value: Cannot invoke "com.acme.payment.Method.getType()" because "payment.method" is null — charge attempted with no payment method attached to order

title: NullPointerException: refund.TransactionId is null in RefundService

metadata.value: Cannot invoke "String.equals()" because refund.getOriginalTransactionId() is null — original charge may have been created before transaction_id column was added

title: RateLimitError: downstream service returned 429 Too Many Requests

metadata.value: upstream auth-service returned HTTP 429: X-RateLimit-Limit: 100, X-RateLimit-Remaining: 0, X-RateLimit-Reset: 1710403260

title: UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'avatarUrl')

metadata.value: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'avatarUrl') at UserAvatar.tsx:42:18 — user object undefined when profile fetch races with render
NetworkError: Failed to fetch — CORS preflight rejected; likely caused by OPTIONS returning 401 from auth middleware (see PR #830)
